8:["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 mt-4 shadow-lg border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 mb-10","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 leading-tight mb-5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"The Morning Routine That Sets Up Your Whole Remote Workday"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/authors/sara-osei","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Sara Osei","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Sara Osei"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Productivity Researcher"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","5 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"January 5, 2025"}]]}]]}]
9:["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-10 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"How you start the morning shapes everything that follows. A practical guide to building a remote work routine that actually sticks."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-remote-work-blur","children":"The Remote Work Blur"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"One of remote work's most insidious problems is the lack of transition. When you work in an office, the commute — annoying as it is — serves as a psychological buffer between home mode and work mode."}}],["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Without that buffer, many remote workers start work before they're mentally ready, or find themselves never quite switching off. The morning routine is your commute replacement."}}],["$","h2","3",{"id":"the-non-negotiable-leave-the-house-first","children":"The Non-Negotiable: Leave the House First"}],["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Before sitting down to work, go outside. Walk around the block. Get a coffee. Drop a letter at the postbox. It doesn't matter what, as long as it involves physical movement, fresh air, and leaving the building."}}],["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This does two things: it exposes you to natural light (which helps regulate your circadian rhythm and makes you more alert), and it creates a sense of transition — you left, and now you're \"arriving\" at work."}}],["$","h2","6",{"id":"the-startup-ritual","children":"The Startup Ritual"}],["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"After the morning walk, have a consistent sequence for starting your workday. Something like:"}}],["$","ol","8",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Make coffee or tea"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Review yesterday's unfinished items"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Write three priorities for today on paper"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Close email and Slack for the first 60–90 minutes"}}]]}],["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The paper list matters. There's something about writing by hand that commits you to priorities in a way that a to-do app doesn't quite replicate."}}],["$","h2","10",{"id":"protect-the-morning","children":"Protect the Morning"}],["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The first hours of your day are when willpower and focus are highest. Guard them fiercely."}}],["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Don't check email first thing. Email is someone else's agenda, not yours. When you open email before you've done meaningful work, you're letting the day happen to you rather than directing it."}}],["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Do your hardest task first. Whatever you've been procrastinating, whatever requires the most mental energy — do it before lunch while your brain is fresh."}}],["$","h2","14",{"id":"the-shutdown-ritual","children":"The Shutdown Ritual"}],["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The end of the workday needs a ritual just as much as the start."}}],["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"At a fixed time — not \"when the inbox is at zero\" — close everything, write tomorrow's top priorities, and say out loud (or at least think deliberately): \"I'm done for the day.\""}}],["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"It sounds almost embarrassingly simple, but the explicit shutdown cue is what trains your brain to actually stop thinking about work once you've closed the laptop."}}],"$Lc","$Ld","$Le"]}],"$Lf","$L10","$L11"]}],"$L12"]}]
a:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
b:["$","$L13",null,{"children":["$","$14",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@15"}]}]
c:["$","h2","18",{"id":"consistency-over-perfection","children":"Consistency Over Perfection"}]
d:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"You won't nail this every day. Some mornings are chaotic. Some evenings bleed into evenings."}}]
e:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The goal isn't a perfect routine — it's a default one. A track you return to when things get derailed. Build the track first, and the perfect days will take care of themselves."}}]
f:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Productivity","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-green-50 text-green-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Productivity"}],[["$","$L3","morning-routine",{"href":"/blog/tag/morning-routine","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","morning-routine"]}],["$","$L3","remote-work",{"href":"/blog/tag/remote-work","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","remote-work"]}],["$","$L3","habits",{"href":"/blog/tag/habits","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","habits"]}],["$","$L3","productivity",{"href":"/blog/tag/productivity","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","productivity"]}]]]}]
